refined_caption: The hospital privacy curtain in the room is torn and damaged. The tear is visible, compromising patient privacy.
complaint_description: I was admitted to the hospital and was shocked to see that the privacy curtain in my room was torn. This is a concern for me as it affects my privacy and makes me feel uncomfortable. I hope this can be addressed soon.
voice_text: The privacy curtain in my hospital room is all torn, can someone please fix it?
